name: ludo-sphere
description: Premium multiplayer Ludo game — Ludo Sphere

scripts.dev: node scripts/kill-dev-ports.mjs && concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client --include=dev
scripts.android:build: npm run android:prepare --prefix client && npm run build:android --prefix client && cd client && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:build-usb: npm run android:prepare-usb --prefix client && npm run build:android --prefix client && cd client && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:apk: npm run android:build && cd client/android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:sync: npm run build:android --prefix client && cd client && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:open: cd client && npx cap open android
